category_sources: Official usage.jdx.dev documentation describes Usage as a specification and CLI for defining CLI tools.
source_facts.description says usage is a tool for working with usage-spec CLIs.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses the product name usage/--usage.
docs_sources: Official docs include a spec section and CLI reference for usage.
source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs describe CLI specs, generated completions, markdown documentation, man pages, and KDL usage specs.
